flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at San Antonio College fell 32% between 2019 and 2022 (66.9% → 45.7%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at San Antonio College rose 28% between 2006 and 2009 ($3.3k → $4.2k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at San Antonio College fell 30% between 2021 and 2024 ($14.1k → $10.0k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at San Antonio College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 (14.7k → 16.4k).
